text:
Fluoroscopy (, rom. Fururasukopī) is a spell card that can be found in the Greed Island game. It allows a player to view all the restricted slots of one target player that they have previously encountered during the game.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This spell card allows the user to view all of the designated card slots of a previously met player in the game. This card can be used at long range, allowing players to openly view another player's cards without them being aware of it.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1002 :: 
対象プレイヤー１名の指定ポケットページを全て見る。（ゲーム内で出会ったことのあるプレイヤーに限る）
|-
![Eng]
|No.1002 :: Fluoroscopy 
Allows you to see all restricted slot cards of the target. (Only that you've previously met.)
|}

Trivia

When put in the binder, this card shows the list of players met without being instantly consumed. If it is not cast, the user can utilize a single "Fluoroscopy" card to check their contact list over and over. This trick was revealed by Asta to Gon's team in Chapter 154.
Gon had Hisoka use this trick in Chapter 159 to see if the magician had met Tsezguerra.
This card was used against Gon in Chapter 151, but his "Blackout Curtain" cancelled its effects.
